# kCVOpenGLESTextureCacheMaximumTextureAgeKey

**Global Variable**

By default, textures will age out after one second. Setting a maximum texture age of zero will disable the age-out mechanism completely. The [doc://com.apple.corevideo/documentation/CoreVideo/CVOpenGLESTextureCacheFlush(_:_:)] function can be used to force eviction in either case.

## Declaration

```swift
let kCVOpenGLESTextureCacheMaximumTextureAgeKey: CFString
```
title: kCVOpenGLESTextureCacheMaximumTextureAgeKey
